title: GAVENO CAVAILIA Easy Care Banded Stripe Duvet Set Quilt Cover and Pillowcases Luxury Soft and Cosy Lined Bedding MOXIE Double - Blush Pink
features: 3PC, SUPER SOFT BED SET: The three-piece Moxie Striped bed set includes a duvet cover and pillowcases in this striking stripy design.
SMOOTH AND ELEGANT FINISH: Sumptuous material, exquisite craftsmanship and a hidden fastening add to the smooth, polished look of this bed cover collection
RANGE OF SOOTHING SHADES AVAILABLE: This easy-care home accessory addition comes in a choice of black & white, blush pink or blue shades to suit your style and radiate relaxation.
STYLISH STRIPE PATTERN: The modern line pattern on the front of this lightweight duvet cover adds understated sophistication and simple elegance into your bedroom décor.
COOL AND COMFORTABLE QUILT COVER: This reversible quilt cover is expertly designed to help keep you at the ideal temperature throughout the night so you can enjoy undisturbed rest.
